footer.ctaSubtitle: Men's clothing, footwear, grooming, and essentials — curated for style and comfort, with a fast bilingual checkout.
footer.aboutBody: CartNexus is a men's fashion store online — apparel, shoes, skincare, and daily essentials in one place, with Bangla and English support.

home.description: From casual wear and formal fits to sneakers, boots, and men's skincare — CartNexus brings what you wear and use every day into one clean shop. Browse in Bangla or English, check out fast, and come back when your wardrobe needs a refresh.

manage.title: Footwear & care

experience.title: Shop the way you like

aboutPage.heroTitle: Built for men who value clarity, quality, and trust
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: CartNexus is a dedicated men's fashion destination. We bring apparel, footwear, grooming, and everyday essentials into one thoughtfully organized store—with clear product information, curated brands, and a checkout experience that respects your time.
aboutPage.trustTitle: A shopping experience you can rely on
aboutPage.trustLead: Online shopping for clothes and daily care should feel straightforward—not guesswork.
aboutPage.trustBody: We focus on the products men actually wear and use, present them with honest descriptions and imagery, and keep our catalog structured so you can find the right fit fast. Whether you browse in English or Bangla, our goal is the same: help you decide with confidence.
aboutPage.storyP1: Too many shoppers still face vague sizing notes, stock photos that don't match reality, and slow answers after they place an order. CartNexus was created to raise the bar for men's fashion online—starting with a catalog that is easy to filter, easy to read, and backed by responsive service.
aboutPage.storyP2: Today we combine careful curation, consistent product data, and dependable fulfillment practices so every order reflects the trust you place in us. We're not here for a one-off sale—we're here to earn your long-term confidence.
aboutPage.p1Body: Every policy and page layout is judged by one question: does this make shopping simpler and safer for you?
aboutPage.p2Body: We aim for accurate names, descriptions, and imagery so what you see is what you get—no inflated claims.
aboutPage.p3Body: Our assortment is edited for real routines: work, weekends, workouts, and grooming—without endless duplicate SKUs.
aboutPage.p4Body: We prioritize clear communication and fair handling of inquiries, because reputation is built one order at a time.
aboutPage.processTitle: A focused process, end to end
aboutPage.processIntro: From the products we list to the way we pack your order, a few disciplined steps keep standards high.
aboutPage.s1Body: We organize men's fashion by category and brand so you can move from tees and shirts to footwear and grooming without friction.
aboutPage.s2Body: Listings are reviewed for clarity—names, descriptions, and visuals should line up before a product goes live in the shop.
aboutPage.s3Body: Orders are prepared with attention to detail and handed to reliable logistics partners so your package arrives in good condition.
aboutPage.testimonialsIntro: Feedback from men who shop with CartNexus.
aboutPage.testimonialHint: Use arrows or dots — rotates automatically; pauses when you hover.
aboutPage.t1Quote: Clear product pages, fast checkout, and the shirt looked exactly like the photos. I'll be back for more.
aboutPage.t2Quote: I switched the site to Bangla for my dad—he found chinos and sneakers without calling me for help. Huge win.
aboutPage.t3Quote: CartNexus is my go-to for basics and grooming. Prices feel fair and support actually replies when I have a question.
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Explore curated men's fashion and essentials—or reach out through our contact section if you need a hand choosing the right product.

contactPage.heroTitle: We'd love to hear from you
contactPage.heroSubtitle: Questions about products, sizing, delivery, or your order? Our team is here to help—with clear answers in English or Bangla.
contactPage.infoEmailNote: We aim to reply within 24 hours
contactPage.formSubtitle: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
contactPage.formSuccess: Thank you — your message was sent. We'll be in touch shortly.
contactPage.faqSubtitle: Quick answers about shopping with CartNexus. Still stuck? Use the form above.
contactPage.faq1A: We work with trusted brands and suppliers listed in our store. Product pages show clear descriptions and imagery so you know what you're buying.
contactPage.faq2Q: How do I choose the right size?
contactPage.faq2A: Check the product description and any sizing notes on the page. If you're unsure, email us with the product name and we'll help you decide.
contactPage.faq3A: Delivery times depend on your location and courier. After you order, we'll share updates by email. Typical urban delivery is a few business days once dispatched.
contactPage.faq4Q: Can I return or exchange an item?
contactPage.faq4A: Contact us with your order details and reason. We'll explain the options that apply to your purchase and guide you through the next steps.
contactPage.faq5A: Yes. Use the language switcher to browse CartNexus in Bangla or English anytime.
contactPage.ctaSubtitle: From everyday basics to footwear and grooming—everything in one catalog.

privacyPage.heroSubtitle: How CartNexus collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information when you use our website and services.
privacyPage.disclaimer: This document describes our privacy practices in plain language. For production use you should have it reviewed by qualified legal counsel for your jurisdiction.
privacyPage.scopeBody:
CartNexus (“we”, “us”, “our”) operates the CartNexus website and related online services focused on men's fashion and lifestyle products. This Privacy Policy applies to personal data we process when you visit our site, create an account, place an order, subscribe to updates, contact us, or otherwise interact with us online.

By using our services, you acknowledge this Policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the site.
privacyPage.collectBody:
We may collect the following categories of information, depending on how you use CartNexus:

• Identity & account data: name, email address, and similar details you provide when registering or checking out.

• Transaction data: order contents, delivery-related information you supply, and payment status (payment card numbers are processed by payment providers where applicable—we do not store full card details on our servers).

• Technical & usage data: IP address, browser type, device information, pages viewed, and approximate location derived from IP, collected via logs and similar technologies.

• Communications: messages you send through contact forms, email, or support channels.

• Marketing preferences: whether you opted in to newsletters or promotional messages when such features are available.
privacyPage.useBody:
We use personal data to:

• Provide and improve our store: process orders, manage accounts, display the catalog, and personalize your experience (e.g. language preference).

• Customer support: respond to inquiries and handle requests related to orders or your account.

• Security & fraud prevention: detect abuse, protect our systems, and enforce our terms.

• Analytics & product improvement: understand how the site is used in aggregate to fix issues and improve performance (using anonymized or aggregated data where possible).

• Marketing: send promotional communications only where you have consented or where permitted by law.

We do not sell your personal information to third parties in the traditional sense of selling lists of individuals for money.
privacyPage.legalBody:
Depending on your location, laws such as the GDPR may require a “legal basis” for processing. We generally rely on:

• Performance of a contract — to fulfil orders and provide services you request.

• Legitimate interests — to secure our platform, improve our services, and communicate with you about your account, balanced against your rights.

• Consent — where required for marketing cookies or optional communications; you may withdraw consent at any time.

• Legal obligation — where we must retain or disclose information to comply with law.
privacyPage.cookiesBody:
We use cookies and similar technologies (e.g. local storage) to keep you signed in, remember preferences such as language, measure traffic, and improve site functionality.

You can control cookies through your browser settings. Blocking essential cookies may limit certain features (e.g. staying logged in). Where we use non-essential analytics or marketing cookies, we will seek consent where required.
privacyPage.sharingBody:
We may share personal data with:

• Service providers who assist us (e.g. hosting, email delivery, payment processing, analytics), under contracts that require them to protect your data and use it only for the services they provide.

• Legal & safety: regulators, law enforcement, or others when we believe disclosure is required by law or necessary to protect rights, safety, or integrity of CartNexus and our users.

• Business transfers: in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your data may transfer as part of that transaction, subject to appropriate safeguards.

We do not allow unrelated third parties to use your data for their own marketing without your consent.
privacyPage.retentionBody:
We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this Policy, including satisfying legal, accounting, or reporting requirements.

Order and account records may be kept for a period defined by applicable law or legitimate business need. Technical logs may be retained for a shorter period unless needed for security investigations.
privacyPage.securityBody: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures designed to protect personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. No method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure; we encourage you to use strong passwords and protect your account credentials.
privacyPage.rightsBody:
Depending on where you live, you may have rights to:

• Access a copy of your personal data.

• Correct inaccurate data.

• Request deletion or restriction of processing in certain cases.

• Object to processing based on legitimate interests or direct marketing.

• Lodge a complaint with a data protection authority.

To exercise these rights, contact us using the details on our Contact page. We will respond within a reasonable timeframe as required by law.
privacyPage.childrenBody: CartNexus is directed at adults. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age where parental consent is required in your country. If you believe we have collected such data, please contact us and we will take steps to delete it.
privacyPage.transfersBody: Our servers and service providers may be located in Bangladesh or other countries. If we transfer personal data across borders, we will take steps consistent with applicable law to ensure appropriate protection (e.g. contractual safeguards or adequacy decisions).
privacyPage.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The “Last updated” date at the top will change when we do. For material changes, we may provide additional notice (e.g. a banner on the site or email where appropriate). Continued use after changes means you accept the updated Policy.
privacyPage.contactBody: For privacy-related questions or requests, please reach out via our Contact page or email support@cartnexus.local. We will work with you to resolve your concern.

termsPage.heroSubtitle: The rules that apply when you use the CartNexus website, browse our catalog, create an account, or place an order.
termsPage.disclaimer: These Terms are provided for clarity and transparency. For production use, have them reviewed by qualified legal counsel for your business and jurisdiction.
termsPage.highlight1: By placing an order or using our site, you agree to these Terms in full.
termsPage.highlight2: Prices are shown in Bangladeshi Taka (৳ / BDT) unless otherwise stated and may change before checkout is completed.
termsPage.highlight3: Returns and exchanges are subject to the eligibility rules and time limits described below.
termsPage.highlight4: Delivery times are estimates; we will communicate delays where reasonably possible.
termsPage.acceptanceBody:
Welcome to CartNexus. These Terms & Conditions (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of our website, mobile experience, and related services (together, the “Services”) through which we offer men's fashion and lifestyle products.

By accessing the Services, creating an account, or placing an order, you confirm that you have read these Terms and agree to be bound by them. If you do not agree, you must stop using the Services.

These Terms apply to all visitors, registered users, and customers. Additional policies (including our Privacy Policy) form part of your agreement with us where referenced.
termsPage.useBody:
You may use CartNexus only for lawful purposes. You agree not to:

• Violate any applicable law or regulation.

• Misrepresent your identity or affiliation, or engage in fraudulent conduct.

• Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, other users' accounts, or data.

• Upload malware, overload our infrastructure, or interfere with the proper working of the Services.

• Scrape, harvest, or use automated means to collect data from the Services without our prior written consent.

• Send unsolicited bulk messages or spam through our contact tools.

We may suspend or terminate access if we reasonably believe you have breached these rules or pose a risk to CartNexus or other users.
termsPage.productsBody:
We aim to display accurate product names, descriptions, images, and availability. Minor variations in colour or appearance may occur due to screens and photography. If a listing contains a material error, we may refuse or cancel the affected order and will notify you.

Prices are listed in BDT unless we clearly state otherwise. Taxes, fees, or delivery charges may be added at checkout where applicable. Prices can change without notice; the price that applies is the one shown when you complete checkout (or, for offline arrangements, when we confirm your order).

We may limit quantities, refuse orders, or discontinue products. We are not liable to third parties for such changes beyond refunding any payment already taken for a cancelled item where required.
termsPage.ordersBody:
When you submit an order, you make an offer to purchase. A contract is formed when we accept the order—typically by sending an order confirmation or dispatching goods, according to our process.

You must provide accurate contact, delivery, and payment information. You authorize us and our payment partners to charge your chosen payment method for the total amount due.

We may cancel orders (with notice where practical) if products are unavailable, pricing errors occur, we suspect fraud, or for other legitimate operational reasons. If payment was captured, we will refund in line with applicable rules.

You are responsible for complying with import, tax, or use obligations in your location where relevant.
termsPage.shippingBody:
Delivery options, charges, and estimated timelines are shown during checkout or in order communications. Estimates are not guaranteed; delays may occur due to weather, courier issues, holidays, or events outside our reasonable control.

Risk of loss and title for physical goods generally pass to you upon delivery to the address you provided. If you do not receive an order within a reasonable time, contact us and we will help investigate.

If we currently restrict shipping to certain areas within Bangladesh (or beyond), that will be stated at checkout. You are responsible for providing a correct, reachable delivery address.
termsPage.returnsBody:
Our goal is a fair returns process. Unless a product page states otherwise, you may request a return or exchange within a stated period (e.g. 14 days) from delivery, provided items are unused, in original condition with tags and packaging where applicable, and accompanied by proof of purchase.

Certain items may be non-returnable for hygiene or safety reasons (e.g. opened personal care products) as marked on the product page.

Damaged or incorrect items should be reported promptly with photos if requested. Approved refunds will be processed using the original payment method or another reasonable method within a commercially reasonable timeframe.

Nothing in this section limits any non-waivable statutory rights you may have under applicable consumer law.
termsPage.ipBody:
All content on the Services—including branding, text, graphics, logos, product images, layout, and software—is owned by CartNexus or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws.

You receive a limited, revocable licence to access and use the Services for personal, non-commercial shopping. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or create derivative works from our content without prior written permission, except as allowed by law.

Misuse may result in termination of access and legal action where appropriate.
termsPage.liabilityBody:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, CartNexus and its team shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, data, or goodwill, arising from your use of the Services or purchase of products.

Our total liability for any claim relating to these Terms or a specific order is limited to the amount you paid to CartNexus for that order (excluding third-party charges we do not control).

Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations; in those cases, our liability is limited to the fullest extent still permitted. Nothing excludes liability that cannot legally be excluded (such as death or personal injury caused by negligence, or fraud).
termsPage.privacyBody: Personal data you provide is processed as described in our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. By using the Services, you acknowledge that processing may occur as outlined there.
termsPage.lawBody:
These Terms are governed by the laws of Bangladesh, without regard to conflict-of-law rules that would apply another jurisdiction.

Courts located in Bangladesh shall have non-exclusive jurisdiction over disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the Services, subject to any mandatory rights you may have to bring claims in your home jurisdiction.

If any provision is held invalid, the remaining provisions remain in effect.
termsPage.changesBody:
We may update these Terms from time to time. We will change the “Last updated” date above and, where changes are material, we may provide additional notice (for example on the site or by email if we have your address).

Continued use of the Services after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree, you should stop using the Services.
termsPage.contactBody:
Questions about these Terms? Contact us:

• Email: support@cartnexus.local

• Use the contact form on our Contact page for privacy or order-related queries.

We will respond within a reasonable time based on volume and complexity.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Men's clothing, shoes, grooming & essentials — from our catalog.
shop.error: Could not load data. Check that the API and MySQL are running.
shop.empty: No products. Run the seed SQL to add demo data.

errors.invalid_token: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.server_misconfigured: Server misconfiguration. Set JWT_SECRET in production.
errors.database_error: Database error — see details below. Usually schema.sql was not applied.
errors.request_failed: Server rejected the request. Is the API running on port 5000?
errors.bad_response: The API did not return valid JSON (wrong URL or HTML page).
errors.badResponseHint: Use npm run dev (port 5173) with the backend on 5000, or configure API proxy.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Start the backend on port 5000.
errors.category_has_products: This category still has products — remove them first.
errors.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.forbidden: You do not have access to this area.

admin.dashboardHint: Counts from MySQL. Charts and orders will come later.
admin.productsCrudHint: Add or edit products. Slug must be unique (Latin letters, numbers, hyphens).
admin.categoriesHint: Add, edit, or delete categories. You cannot delete a category that still has products.

blogPage.metaDescription: Expert guides on men's fashion, sneakers, workwear, grooming, denim fit, and wardrobe essentials. Practical advice for shopping smarter with CartNexus in Bangladesh.
blogPage.heroTitle: Style that works in real life
blogPage.heroSubtitle: Deep dives on fit, footwear, grooming, and building a closet you actually wear — written for men who shop online in Bangladesh and want clear, honest guidance.
blogPage.shopCtaSubtitle: Browse curated men's clothing, shoes, and grooming — bilingual checkout, fast delivery mindset.
